# (RSX) Red Sea Airlines 342 Flight Tracker

### Flight Time

#### Total

##### 6h

#### Elapsed

##### 5h 51m

#### Remaining

##### 9m

### Flight Distance

#### Total

##### 1971 mi

#### Flown

##### 1804 mi

#### Remaining

##### 170 mi

#### Code

##### 73H

#### Description

##### Boeing 737-800 (winglets) Passenger/BBJ2
